blocks.body:
This is a **text block**. It supports full Markdown: headings, [links](https://cachecrime.github.io), lists and `inline code`.

Use text blocks for the narrative body of an investigation. Every other block type below can be inserted between text blocks to build an immersive, evidence-first story.

blocks.text: Every finding is published with its verification trail attached.

blocks.caption: An image block with a caption.
A before/after comparison slider — drag across the image. Ideal for satellite imagery taken at two dates, or claim vs. reality.

events.title: First claim circulates
events.body: Describe what was claimed and where it spread.

events.title: Footage geolocated
events.body: Describe the verification step and the evidence.

events.title: Finding published
events.body: Link to the published verification trail.

blocks.title: Geolocation

markers.label: Nairobi CBD
markers.body: Sample marker — click markers to see evidence notes.

blocks.caption: An interactive map block (OpenStreetMap, no API key required).
A video embed block — paste any YouTube or Vimeo URL, or a direct .mp4 link. TODO: replace with a real video.

blocks.body:
### Document viewer

The document block below embeds a PDF uploaded through the CMS media library — use it for source documents, court filings or reports. *(No sample PDF is bundled, so the frame below will 404 until you upload one.)*

blocks.title: Sample source document
blocks.description: TODO: upload a real PDF via the CMS and update this path.

summary: A demonstration story showing every content block available in the CMS: text, images, before/after comparison, timeline, interactive map, document viewer, video and pull quotes. Delete this once real investigations are published.
title: The First Investigation
